content.query:
SELECT
case 
    when [Phone] is not null then '+1'+Phone
    else [Phone]
end as [phone_id]
,[Email] as [email_id]
,HASHBYTES ( 'MD5', [Email] )  as email_md5hash
,[FirstName] as first_name
,[LastName] as last_name
,[Address1] as address1
,[Address2] as address2
,[City] as city
,[State] as [state]
,[Zip] as zip
,[Zip4] as zip4
,[FirstName]+' '+[LastName] as full_name
,case 
    when [Phone] is not null then '+1'+Phone
    else [Phone]
end as [phone]
,[Email] as [email]
,'windows' as product
,EntryDate as entry_date
,[EverSet] as ever_set
,[EverConfirmed] as ever_confirmed
,[EverIssued] as ever_issued
,[EverNetIssued] as ever_net_issued
,[EverSat] as ever_sat
,[Sold] as sold
,cast(getdate() as DATE) as bulk_upload_date
,'' as division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_TCT_ClientLeads]
 where 
--EntryDate >= '2023-01-01' and 
(Email is not null or Phone is not null)
and ClientID not in 
 (
     'gn07db','i417db','f199db','yy72db','d453db','v3v3db','a5b5db','zz99db'
 )
 /*
 and productid IN
 (
    SELECT 
    [ProductID]
    FROM [RDM].[REF_PROSPECTING_PRODUCTID_MAPPING]
    where ProductCategory='Bath'
 )*/
 and Zip in
 (
     SELECT 
    prdZip.[ZipCode]
    FROM 
    [RDM].[REF_PRODUCT_ZIP_CODES] prdZip
    ,[EDW].[DIM_BRANCH_ZIP] brnZip
    where 
    prdZip.ZipCode = brnZip.ZipCode
    and prdZip.Division = brnZip.Division
    and brnZip.BranchID in ('MAC-GSCLT')
    and prdZip.Product = 'Coat'
 )
 and EverSet = 1
